name: Marty the Merry Mushroom
key_features: Symbiotic Entity (Wild Shape: +80 temp HP, doubled Halo damage dice, +1d6 necrotic on melee)
Halo of Spores (reaction: 1d10 necrotic to creature within 10 ft, CON DC 19)
Spreading Spores (bonus action: 10-ft cube of Halo damage within 30 ft while Symbiotic active)
Fungal Infestation (reaction: animate dead beast/humanoid as zombie within 10 ft)
Wild Shape (unlimited uses at level 20 - Archdruid)
defenses: Immune to: Blinded, Critical Hits, Deafened, Frightened, Poisoned
party_role_guess: Healer / Debuffer / Summoner (spore AoE, fungal minions, druid full caster)
